data.name: App_ErrorRepeated
data.value: Errors keep repeating, the application will close. Reports are saved in the logs folder.

data.name: App_ErrorContinues
data.value: An unexpected error occurred, work continues. A report is saved in the logs folder.

data.name: Sidebar_AnalysisHint
data.value: XPRESS and LZX estimates are available after selecting a game

data.name: Update_OpenPageTooltip
data.value: Open the download page for the new version

data.name: Header_Subtitle
data.value: Find installed games and estimate the possible space savings

data.name: Header_RefreshCoversTooltip
data.value: Re-check and download covers for all games

data.name: Watcher_RecompressAllTooltip
data.value: Recompress every degraded game in one queue — administrator rights are requested once

data.name: MultiSelect_Tooltip
data.value: Select several games and compress them in one queue

data.name: DegradedFilter_Tooltip
data.value: Show only games that need finishing

data.name: Queue_MethodTooltip
data.value: Compression method for the whole queue

data.name: Card_DirectStorageTooltip
data.value: The game uses DirectStorage. NTFS compression breaks its fast read path and can slow loading. Compression is not recommended.

data.name: Panel_DirectStorageWarning
data.value: The game uses DirectStorage: NTFS compression breaks its fast read path and can slow loading. Compression is not recommended. In expert mode it is available after confirmation.

data.name: Queue_SkipTooltip
data.value: Cancel the current game and move to the next one

data.name: Queue_StopAfterCurrentTooltip
data.value: Let the current game finish, then stop the queue

data.name: Queue_StopAllTooltip
data.value: Stop the queue immediately — the interrupted game can be finished later

data.name: Info_AutoBody
data.value: vKOROBKU will analyze the files, benchmark read speed and pick a suitable XPRESS or LZX mode on its own.

data.name: Info_AutoConfirm
data.value: Before changing any files the app shows a forecast and asks for confirmation.

data.name: Info_ActiveLocked
data.value: The mode is locked until the operation completes or is stopped.

data.name: Info_PartialBody
data.value: Finish compression processes the remaining files with the same method — already compressed ones are skipped. The method can be changed after a full decompression.

data.name: Info_CompressedBody
data.value: Windows transparently decompresses the files as they are read. The game content is unchanged.

data.name: Action_DecompressPartialTooltip
data.value: The game is partially compressed — its files can be fully restored to the original state

data.name: Action_FinishTooltip
data.value: Compress the remaining files with the same method — already compressed ones are skipped

data.name: Settings_Subtitle
data.value: Compressed games are checked at application startup and with the Check now button.

data.name: Settings_LanguageRestartHint
data.value: The language changes after the application is restarted.

data.name: Settings_WatcherEnabled
data.value: Check compressed games for updates at startup

data.name: Settings_SkipEnabled
data.value: Skip files that are known to be incompressible (media, archives)

data.name: Settings_ExtensionFormatError
data.value: An extension looks like ".ext" — a dot and up to 15 characters without spaces.

data.name: Settings_ExtensionInDefault
data.value: The {0} extension is already in the default list.

data.name: Settings_DecayError
data.value: The decay threshold is a number from 1 to 100 percent.

data.name: Settings_SavingsError
data.value: The minimum gain is a whole number of megabytes, at least 1.

data.name: Settings_ResetConfirm
data.value: Remove all manually added extensions and return to the default list?
